Commercial Stucco in Comal County, TX

Comal County blends Hill Country tourism, a thriving German-Texan heritage district, and steady residential-driven retail growth along the I-35 corridor. Star Stucco of Austin provides commercial stucco services to the businesses that make New Braunfels, Canyon Lake, and the surrounding communities thrive.

Get a Free EstimateCall (512) 706-9699

Professional Stucco for Comal County's Commercial Landscape

New Braunfels has become one of the fastest-growing cities in the nation, and the commercial development following that growth shows no signs of slowing. From the Creekside and Gruene Road retail corridors to downtown's historic German storefronts, commercial property owners need exterior finishes that attract customers and withstand heavy foot traffic.

The Comal and Guadalupe rivers draw millions of visitors each year, and the hotels, restaurants, and entertainment venues that serve them require stucco that looks sharp season after season. Our team understands the demands placed on tourism-facing commercial properties and selects materials that resist moisture, sun damage, and the wear that comes with high visitor volume.

Canyon Lake's commercial corridor along FM 306 and the unincorporated areas north of New Braunfels present their own challenges, including hillside terrain, limited road access, and exposure to wind-driven rain. We plan our projects around these factors so the work stays on schedule and the finished product lasts.

What's Included With Our Commercial Stucco in Comal County

Every project includes expert craftsmanship, quality materials, and a commitment to lasting results.

Site Assessment

We inspect your Comal County commercial property's walls, drainage, and site access to build an accurate picture of the project requirements.

Project Planning & Scheduling

Our schedule works around your peak business periods, especially the heavy tourist season that defines much of New Braunfels' commercial calendar.

Surface Preparation

All surfaces are cleaned, patched, and primed to ensure proper adhesion and performance from the new stucco system.

Commercial-Grade Application

Base and finish coats are applied using commercial methods that maintain consistency across large wall areas on multi-story and multi-building properties.

Finish Coat & Detailing

We match the texture and color to your building's design, including the Old World European profiles popular in New Braunfels' heritage-influenced commercial areas.

Final Inspection & Warranty

A detailed walk-through confirms the project meets your standards, and you receive full warranty documentation before final payment.

Common Commercial Stucco Needs in Comal County

Comal County's tourism economy, growing retail base, and expanding residential communities create diverse commercial stucco needs. These are the projects we see most often.

New Construction Exteriors

New retail and commercial buildings along I-35 and the Creekside corridor in New Braunfels need stucco installed to developer specifications on tight construction schedules.

Storefront Renovation

Historic storefronts on the New Braunfels downtown square and in Gruene benefit from stucco restoration that preserves their heritage character while updating durability.

Multifamily Buildings

New apartment communities in New Braunfels and Garden Ridge need stucco exteriors that look good at lease-up and hold up for years under normal tenant wear.

Office Park Stucco

Medical offices, law firms, and corporate offices along Walnut Avenue and Loop 337 present a professional image with consistent, well-maintained stucco finishes.

Retail Center Restoration

Shopping centers along Common Street and FM 306 benefit from stucco restoration that addresses cracking, staining, and fading from years of weather exposure.

HOA Common Areas

Entry monuments, recreation centers, and perimeter walls at Comal County's master-planned communities require stucco that aligns with the original development design.

Why Choose Us for Commercial Stucco in Comal County?

  • Experience with commercial projects across New Braunfels, Canyon Lake, Gruene, and Garden Ridge
  • Full commercial liability and bonding that satisfies hospitality, retail, and property management requirements
  • Scheduling that respects peak tourist seasons along the Comal and Guadalupe rivers
  • Skilled in European-inspired stucco profiles that complement New Braunfels' architectural heritage
  • Compliance with City of New Braunfels permitting and historic district design standards
  • Materials tested for the humidity, UV intensity, and storm exposure common in Comal County

Licensed & Insured

Full liability coverage and workers' compensation for every project in Comal County.

20+ Years Experience

Decades of hands-on stucco work across Central Texas residential and commercial properties.

Certified Applicators

Certified by Sto Corp, Senergy/BASF, Master Wall, Dryvit, and Parex LaHabra for the highest quality results.

Our Commercial Stucco Process

A straightforward approach from start to finish — no surprises, no shortcuts.

1

Schedule a Commercial Consultation

Reach out to set up a property visit at your Comal County commercial site. We will walk the building together and discuss your vision and budget.

2

Site Inspection & Scope

Our team documents the wall conditions, takes measurements, and notes any access or scheduling factors that will shape the project plan.

3

Detailed Bid & Timeline

You get a clear, itemized proposal with material specs and a schedule that aligns with your business cycle and tenant needs.

4

Professional Execution

We bring the right crew and equipment for the job, keep the work area clean and safe, and deliver a finished product you can be proud of.
